! ========================================================================
! L4-01: VAV Annual Test
! Variable Air Volume Unit - Year Simulation
! ========================================================================

TITLE
	L4-01 VAV Annual Test ;

GDAT
	FILE w=tokyo_3column_SI.has ;
	RUN (12/25) 1/1-12/31 ;
	PRINT 1/1-12/31 *wd ;
*

EXSRF
	r=0.2 ;
	south a=0.0 ;
	north a=180.0 ;
	east  a=90.0 ;
	west  a=270.0 ;
	Hor ;
	earth Z=1.5 ;
*

WALL
	-E:ExtWall  RC-150 FPS-50 GPB-12 ;
	-R:Roof  GPB-12 FPS-100 RC-150 ;
	-F:Floor  GPB-12 FPS-100 RC-150 ;
*

ROOM
	TestRoom  Vol=80.0
		*s
		alc=4.6
		south: -E ExtWall 16.0 ;
		north: -E ExtWall 16.0 ;
		east:  -E ExtWall 10.0 ;
		west:  -E ExtWall 10.0 ;
		Hor: -R Roof 32.0 ;
		earth: -F Floor 32.0 ;
	*
*

EQPCAT
	VAV vavcat Gmin=0.01 Gmax=0.3 ;
*

SYSCMP
	RoomAC -type RMACD -wet -V Qh=2500 Qhmax=5400 Qhmin=700 Eh=390 Ehmax=1360 Ehmin=95 Gi=0.262 Go=0.51 * ;
	VAVUnit -c vavcat ;
	TestRoom -Nin 1 ;
*

SYSPTH
	ACPath -sys A -f A > RoomAC VAVUnit TestRoom > ;
*

CONTL
	ACPath=ON ;
	LOAD -e RoomAC RoomAC_Tout=Toutset ;
	LOAD -e VAVUnit TestRoom_Tr=Trset ;
	VAVUnit_chmode=HEAT ;
	RoomAC_chmode=HEAT ;
	%s -v Toutset 000-(35.0)-2400 ;
	%s -v Trset 000-(20.0)-2400 ;
*
*
